name: Coconut Topped Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified on the cake mix package.
2. Grease and flour a 13x9 baking pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
4. Pour the prepared cake batter into the greased and floured baking pan.
5. Place the baking pan in the preheated oven and bake for the time specified on the package.
6. Once baked, remove the cake from the oven using an oven mitt.
7. In a small saucepan, combine the finely chopped Snickers candy bars and butter.
8. Melt over low heat, stirring until smooth.
9. Spread the melted chocolate mixture evenly over the top of the cooled cake.
10. Sprinkle the flaked coconut over the chocolate layer.
11. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
